status: TIER 1 PRIMARY-SOURCE BATCH B COMPLETE WITHIN DEFINED SCOPE / SUPPLIER PRODUCT PASSPORT OPEN / NOT PLATINUM CERTIFIED
source_of_truth_principle: The flagship synthesises linked objects; detailed evidence remains in its canonical Evidence, Safety and Monitoring assets.

identity.regulatory_status_control: No regulatory approval claim is made by this build. Regulatory assessment remains an open evidence domain.

plain_english_summary: Retatrutide is an investigational multi-receptor metabolic therapy in the Certiaura evidence model. The current knowledge base contains primary early-phase and phase 2 evidence, sponsor topline phase 3 obesity evidence, an identified phase 3 type 2 diabetes publication that still requires direct extraction, and unresolved primary-source gaps for several substudies and late-stage programmes.

evidence_summary.permitted_use: Receptor pharmacology, mechanism, pharmacokinetic rationale, early proof of concept
Dose-ranging weight-loss efficacy, gastrointestinal tolerability, heart-rate signal
HbA1c efficacy, body-weight outcomes, gastrointestinal safety, hypoglycaemia context
Body-composition domain only; detailed quantitative extraction pending

evidence_summary.source_state: CLOSED FOR TOPLINE / OPEN FOR FULL PUBLICATION
evidence_summary.permitted_use: Pivotal topline efficacy and extension results
Publication identity and development status; direct full-text extraction remains open
Source-discovery queue only; precise quantitative claims not promoted

controlled_clinical_findings.claim: Phase 2 obesity trial: mean body-weight reduction of 24.2% at week 48 in the 12 mg group versus 2.1% with placebo.
Phase 2 type 2 diabetes trial: HbA1c reductions reached approximately 2 percentage points in the higher-dose groups at week 24.
TRIUMPH-1 sponsor topline: mean body-weight reduction of 28.3% at week 80 in the 12 mg group.
controlled_clinical_findings.source_status: Primary sponsor topline; full publication pending

commercial_integration.cost_intelligence: Framework available; no verified universal market price is asserted in this build.
commercial_integration.product_passport: No validated commercial Product Passport is attached in this build.
commercial_integration.marketplace: Marketplace linkage remains subject to product validation and the unresolved legal/regulatory route.
commercial_integration.reports: The consolidated asset can support future evidence, safety, monitoring and cost reports.

certification_status.reason_no_percentage: Weighted Platinum scoring criteria are not yet sufficiently complete for a reproducible headline percentage.

source_closure_scope: pivotal or major randomised human evidence
current safety, contraindication and regulatory controls
authoritative_product_boundary: Retatrutide remains an investigational GIP, GLP-1 and glucagon receptor agonist. TRIUMPH-1 completed in April 2026 without posted registry results, while additional phase 3 studies remain active. A 2026 phase 3 type 2 diabetes trial has been published, but no catalogue RT vial inherits sponsor clinical-material identity or approval.
human_evidence_boundary: The 2023 phase 2 obesity trial reported dose-related weight reduction over 48 weeks. TRANSCEND-T2D-1 reported phase 3 glycaemic and weight outcomes in 2026. Current phase 3 TRIUMPH studies examine obesity and related complications, but trial material and protocols remain sponsor controlled.
safety_source_boundary: Published retatrutide studies report predominantly gastrointestinal adverse events, with dose-related heart-rate increases in the phase 2 obesity trial. Longer-term cardiovascular, gallbladder, pancreatic, retinal, reproductive and rare-event risks remain subject to ongoing phase 3 and post-development evaluation.
